prompt: Create a realistic high-end fashion store photograph of a life-size glossy white female mannequin styled as an anime-inspired police or security officer, shown from mid-thigh upward in a boutique interior with soft warm bokeh lights, clothing racks in the background, and a large window on the left. The mannequin has a smooth featureless face deliberately covered by a centered soft gray square privacy block, a short bob wig in dark ash gray, and a shiny peaked officer cap. Behind the cap is one large translucent acrylic halo panel with ornate white cutout filigree, like a decorative character prop. Outfit details: a crisp white button-up shirt, black-and-gold striped necktie with tie clip, black suspenders and harness straps with metal clips, high-waisted black pinstripe trousers, and a beige trench coat draped cape-like over the shoulders with dark sleeve panels and thin gold trim. Include exactly two small handwritten Japanese sound-effect texts, both reading 「キシッ」, one to the left of the shoulder and one to the right, each with two curved motion lines, suggesting creaking mannequin joints. Add exactly two visible retail price tags clipped to the outfit: one on the chest strap and one hanging near the lower right coat edge, with tiny barcode-like details. Use shallow depth of field, realistic reflections on glossy plastic skin, premium store lighting, vertical 4:5 composition, centered subject, and a polished photorealistic editorial style. Avoid adding extra characters, extra text, or a visible watermark.
